untranslatable_reason: Signal requires quantification of 'pullback retraces large percentage of breakout thrust' which demands dynamic calculation of (pullback_depth / initial_breakout_thrust) ratio. This ratio-based comparison is not expressible with allowed operators and single-value indicators. Required parameters (pullback_retrace_threshold_pct, momentum_bars_lookback, pullback_duration_bars) were marked [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] in source and cannot be inferred from text excerpt alone.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation: Entry conditions captured weak momentum breakout (low volume relative to 20-day average, narrow range relative to ATR). Exit condition uses close reversal below breakout level. However, the core logic—detecting failed breakouts via pullback retrace percentage—requires custom multi-bar calculation logic unavailable in the allowed indicator set. This signal is better suited for implementation as a custom user-defined function in the backtest engine.
